commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair remains; the next action is maintainer acceptance of the upgrade-sensitive credential semantics and normal merge checks.; Cleared: The diff touches credential revocation and session invalidation, but it reuses existing device-management authz patterns and adds no dependency, workflow, secret, or supply-chain surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway `node.pair.remove`, docs, and tests so removing a displayed node can revoke a device-backed `node` role, clear matching legacy node records, and block queued requests after credential invalidation.

PR surface: Source +196, Tests +376, Docs +19. Total +591 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.6 can list device-backed node-role pairings through `createKnownNodeCatalog`, while `node.pair.remove` still calls only `removePairedNode` and returns `unknown nodeId` when the row is only in `devices/paired.json`.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair remains; the next action is maintainer acceptance of the upgrade-sensitive credential semantics and normal merge checks.
